title: DLSA Sonitpur Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority Sonitpur (DLSA Sonitpur)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority Sonitpur (DLSA Sonitpur) Driver (Contractual) Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of DLSA Sonitpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Sonitpur Driver (Contractual) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST (max 45 years), 3 years for OBC/MOBC (max 43 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Class VIII to Class X standard, Valid LMV/four wheeler driving license for not less than 2 years
qualification.details: Class VIII to Class X standard Valid LMV/four wheeler driving license for not less than 2 years

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Sonitpur Driver (Contractual) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sonitpur.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Sonitpur Driver (Contractual) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Driver (Contractual) post is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Class VIII to Class X standard and possess a valid LMV/four-wheeler driving license for at least 2 years to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver (Contractual) position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much will the selected candidate be paid per month?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Driver (Contractual) post will receive a fixed pay of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DLSA Sonitpur Driver (Contractual) recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Driver (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Driving Test to assess driving skills and a Viva-Voce (personal interview) to evaluate suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DLSA Sonitpur, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Driver (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Driver (Contractual) in the District Legal Services Authority Sonitpur.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Driver is on a contractual basis, meaning the employment will be for a fixed term as specified by the organization.
